intro: Tephroseris veresczaginii, also known as the Tephroseris or Rock Daisy, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Tephroseris veresczaginii include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
